qa_pair.question: In project CIFTEST, how many issues of type Story are currently in a statusCategory other than Done? (Use jira_search with JQL and paginate via next_page_token until is_last.)
For the Story in project CIFTEST whose summary contains "password reset", what is its current workflow status? (Find it with jira_search, then confirm with jira_get_issue.)
What issue key does CIFTEST Story with us_id US-0045 map to? (Search by the configured traceability custom field, then return the key.)
